```{r}
results_df$PercBothExpr <- as.numeric(as.character(results_df$PercBothExpr))


# Assuming results_df is already populated and contains the columns:
# Gene1, Gene2, Cluster, PercExprGene1, PercExprGene2, PercBothExpr

# Base R approach using reshape()
wide_df_base <- reshape(results_df, 
                        timevar = "Cluster", 
                        idvar = c("Gene1", "Gene2"),
                        direction = "wide",
                        sep = "_")

# Check the output
print(wide_df_base)


# wide_df <- results_df %>%
#   pivot_wider(
#     names_from = Cluster, 
#     values_from = c(PercExprGene1, PercExprGene2, PercBothExpr),
#     names_glue = "{Cluster}_{.value}"  # Naming pattern to distinguish columns per cluster and metric
#   )
# 
# wide_df$Terminal_PercExprGene1 <- as.numeric(as.character(results_df$PercExprGene1))
# wide_df$PercExprGene2 <- as.numeric(as.character(results_df$PercExprGene2))
# wide_df$PercBothExpr <- as.numeric(as.character(results_df$PercBothExpr))


# Check the newly formatted dataframe
print(wide_df_base)
saveRDS(wide_df_base, 'best_pair_shared_wide_scVI.rds')
openxlsx::write.xlsx(x = wide_df_base, file = 'best_pair_shared_wide_cell_categorization.xlsx')

DefaultAssay(my_data) <- 'RNA_genes'
FeaturePlot(my_data, features = c('LTBP2', 'CNN1'),reduction = 'umap',pt.size = 0.7, order = T,  blend = T, cols = c("darkblue", "green", "magenta"), blend.threshold = 0.5) &DarkTheme() &NoAxes() & plot_annotation(title = 'Carotid HS')


##############
##############
# Make lists of genes that are conservatively expressed across species in the shared SMC phenotypes
gene_list <- list()
tmp <- list()

for (i in unique(my_data$shared_clusters)) {
  for (j in unique(my_data$species)) {
    exrMat <-
      GetAssayData(my_data[, my_data$shared_clusters == i &
                             my_data$species == j], slot = 'data', assay = 'RNA_genes')
    
    # Step 1: Determine if a gene is expressed in a cell
    # Assuming any value greater than 0 indicates expression
    is_expressed <- exrMat > 0
    
    # Step 2: Calculate the percentage of cells in which each gene is expressed
    percent_expressed <- rowSums(is_expressed) / ncol(exrMat) * 100
    
    # Step 3: Identify genes expressed in at least 10% of cells
    keep_genes <-
      names(percent_expressed)[percent_expressed >= 10]
    tmp[[j]] <- keep_genes
  }
   tmp_2 <-
   as.data.frame(sort(Reduce(intersect,list( tmp$pig, tmp$human, tmp$mouse)), decreasing = F) )
   colnames(tmp_2) <- paste('conservative_genes', i)
  gene_list[[i]] <- tmp_2
}

openxlsx::write.xlsx(gene_list, file = 'conservative_genes_expressed_min10pct_per_phenotype_cell_categorization.xlsx', overwrite = T)

table(my_data$integrated_snn_res.0.17, my_data$species)

# Make balanced dataset
set.seed(1984)
my_data_balanced <- my_data[,colnames(my_data) %in% c(
  sample(names(my_data$species[my_data$species == 'human' & my_data$integrated_snn_res.0.17 == 0]), size = 600, replace = F),
  sample(names(my_data$species[my_data$species == 'human' & my_data$integrated_snn_res.0.17 == 1]), size = 500, replace = F),
  sample(names(my_data$species[my_data$species == 'human' & my_data$integrated_snn_res.0.17 == 2]), size = 500, replace = F),
  sample(names(my_data$species[my_data$species == 'human' & my_data$integrated_snn_res.0.17 == 3]), size = 6, replace = F),
  
  
  sample(names(my_data$species[my_data$species == 'pig' & my_data$integrated_snn_res.0.17 == 0]), size = 600, replace = F) ,
  sample(names(my_data$species[my_data$species == 'pig' & my_data$integrated_snn_res.0.17 == 1]), size = 500, replace = F) ,
  sample(names(my_data$species[my_data$species == 'pig' & my_data$integrated_snn_res.0.17 == 2]), size = 500, replace = F) ,
  sample(names(my_data$species[my_data$species == 'pig' & my_data$integrated_snn_res.0.17 == 3]), size = 6, replace = F) ,
  
  
  sample(names(my_data$species[my_data$species == 'mouse' & my_data$integrated_snn_res.0.17 == 0]), size = 600, replace = F),
  sample(names(my_data$species[my_data$species == 'mouse' & my_data$integrated_snn_res.0.17 == 1]), size = 500, replace = F),
  sample(names(my_data$species[my_data$species == 'mouse' & my_data$integrated_snn_res.0.17 == 2]), size = 180, replace = F),
  sample(names(my_data$species[my_data$species == 'mouse' & my_data$integrated_snn_res.0.17 == 3]), size = 6, replace = F)
  )]

table(my_data_balanced$species, my_data_balanced$integrated_snn_res.0.17)

DimPlot_scCustom(my_data_balanced, group.by = 'integrated_snn_res.0.17', split.by = 'species', reduction = 'umap')

Idents(my_data_balanced) <- 'integrated_snn_res.0.17'
DefaultAssay(my_data_balanced) <- 'RNA_genes'

tmp <- FindAllMarkers(my_data_balanced, only.pos = T, min.pct = 0.3)
# tmp <-  tmp[tmp$p_val_adj < 0.05,]
FeaturePlot_scCustom(my_data_balanced, features = c('THBS1', 'SERPINE2'), split.by = 'species', reduction = 'umap')


#### DEseq2
final_species_genes <- readRDS("/faststorage/project/THOR/diana/integration_pigs_with_WT/integrated_pig_mice_hum/closer/more_closer/biomart_109_orth_new.rds")
final_species_genes$Human_gene_name_v98 <- ifelse(is.na(final_species_genes$Human_gene_name_v98) == TRUE, final_species_genes$`Human Ensembl ID`, final_species_genes$Human_gene_name_v98)
final_species_genes$Human_gene_name_v98 <- ifelse(final_species_genes$Human_gene_name_v98 == '', final_species_genes$`Human Ensembl ID`, final_species_genes$Human_gene_name_v98)

CreatePseudoBulkData <- function(raw.data,normalized.data,sample.id,fun="sum")
{
    # fun can be "sum" or "mean"
    library(muscat)
    library(SingleCellExperiment)
    
    if (fun=="sum")
    {
        sce <- SingleCellExperiment(assays=list(counts=raw.data),colData=DataFrame(sample_id=sample.id))
    } else if (fun=="mean") {
        sce <- SingleCellExperiment(assays=list(counts=normalized.data),colData=DataFrame(sample_id=sample.id))
    }
    pb <- aggregateData(sce, assay = "counts", fun=fun, by=c("sample_id"))
    return(pb)
}
    
# Make counts slot with gene names
my_counts <-
  GetAssayData(object = my_data_balanced,
               assay = 'RNA',
               slot = 'counts')
rownames(my_counts) <-
  gsub(pattern = '-0',
       replacement = '',
       x = rownames(my_counts))
rownames(my_counts) %in% final_species_genes$`Pig Ensembl ID` %>% table()
rownames(my_counts)[!rownames(my_counts) %in% final_species_genes$`Pig Ensembl ID`]

my_counts <-
  my_counts[rownames(my_counts)[rownames(my_counts) %in% final_species_genes$`Pig Ensembl ID`],]

rownames(final_species_genes) <-
  final_species_genes$`Pig Ensembl ID`
df <-
  data.frame(
    pig_ens_data = rownames(my_counts),
    transl_human_gene = final_species_genes[rownames(my_counts), 'Human_gene_name_v98'],
    transl_hum_ens = final_species_genes[rownames(my_counts), 'Human Ensembl ID']
  )

rownames(df) <- df$pig_ens_data
rownames(my_counts) <-
  df[rownames(my_counts), 'transl_human_gene']

# Run DESeq2 across species within each shared SMC cluster (pairwise)
deseq2_res <- list()
for(i in unique(my_data_balanced$shared_clusters)) {
  my_data_balanced_subset <-
    my_data_balanced[, my_data_balanced$shared_clusters == i]
  pb <-
    CreatePseudoBulkData(
      raw.data = my_counts[, colnames(my_counts) %in% colnames(my_data_balanced_subset)],
      sample.id = my_data_balanced_subset$orig.ident,
      fun = 'sum'
    )
  
  bca <-
    as.data.frame.matrix(table(my_data_balanced_subset$orig.ident, my_data_balanced_subset$species))
  group <- apply(bca, 1, function(x)
    colnames(bca)[which.max(x)])
  
  
  #Make the model and contrast for statistical testing
  df_con <- DataFrame(condition = factor(group))
  pb_counts <- assay(pb)
  mode(pb_counts) <- "integer"
  dge <- DESeqDataSetFromMatrix(pb_counts,
                                colData = df_con,
                                design = ~ 0 + condition)
  dds <- DESeq(dge, betaPrior = FALSE)
  
  hp_res <-
    results(
      dds,
      contrast = c("condition", "human", "pig"),
      independentFiltering = TRUE,
      alpha = 0.05,
      pAdjustMethod = "BH",
      parallel = FALSE
    )
  hp_res <-
    lfcShrink(
      dds,
      contrast = c("condition", "human", "pig"),
      res = hp_res,
      type = 'ashr'
    )
  hp_res <-
    as.data.frame(hp_res@listData, row.names = hp_res@rownames)
  
  
  colnames(hp_res) <- paste('HP', colnames(hp_res), sep = '_')
  
  hm_res <-
    results(
      dds,
      contrast = c("condition", "human", "mouse"),
      independentFiltering = TRUE,
      alpha = 0.05,
      pAdjustMethod = "BH",
      parallel = FALSE
    )
  hm_res <-
    lfcShrink(
      dds,
      contrast = c("condition", "human", "mouse"),
      res = hm_res,
      type = 'ashr'
    )
  hm_res <-
    as.data.frame(hm_res@listData, row.names = hm_res@rownames)
  colnames(hm_res) <- paste('HM', colnames(hm_res), sep = '_')
  
  pm_res <-
    results(
      dds,
      contrast = c("condition", "pig", "mouse"),
      independentFiltering = TRUE,
      alpha = 0.05,
      pAdjustMethod = "BH",
      parallel = FALSE
    )
  pm_res <-
    lfcShrink(
      dds,
      contrast = c("condition", "pig", "mouse"),
      res = pm_res,
      type = 'ashr'
    )
  pm_res <-
    as.data.frame(pm_res@listData, row.names = pm_res@rownames)
  colnames(pm_res) <- paste('PM', colnames(pm_res), sep = '_')
  
  res_all_org <- cbind(hp_res, hm_res, pm_res)
  res_all_org$gene <- rownames(res_all_org)
  res_all_org$exp_PIG <- rowMeans2(expm1(subset(my_data_balanced_subset, species == 'pig')[["RNA_genes"]]@data[rownames(res_all_org), ]))
  res_all_org$exp_HUMAN <- rowMeans2(expm1(subset(my_data_balanced_subset, species == 'human')[["RNA_genes"]]@data[rownames(res_all_org), ]))
  res_all_org$exp_MOUSE <- rowMeans2(expm1(subset(my_data_balanced_subset, species == 'mouse')[["RNA_genes"]]@data[rownames(res_all_org), ]))
  
  res_all_org$pct_PIG <- rowSums(subset(my_data_balanced_subset, species == 'pig')[["RNA_genes"]]@data[rownames(res_all_org), ] > 0) / ncol(subset(my_data_balanced_subset, species == 'pig')[["RNA_genes"]]@data[rownames(res_all_org), ] > 0) * 100
  res_all_org$pct_HUMAN <- rowSums(subset(my_data_balanced_subset, species == 'human')[["RNA_genes"]]@data[rownames(res_all_org), ] > 0) / ncol(subset(my_data_balanced_subset, species == 'human')[["RNA_genes"]]@data[rownames(res_all_org), ] > 0) * 100
  res_all_org$pct_MOUSE <- rowSums(subset(my_data_balanced_subset, species == 'mouse')[["RNA_genes"]]@data[rownames(res_all_org), ] > 0) / ncol(subset(my_data_balanced_subset, species == 'mouse')[["RNA_genes"]]@data[rownames(res_all_org), ] > 0) * 100

  deseq2_res[[i]] <- res_all_org
}
saveRDS(deseq2_res, file = 'deseq2.pairwise.shared.SMC.clusters_Elastic_cell_categorization.rds')
write.xlsx(deseq2_res, 'deseq2.pairwise.shared.SMC.clusters_Elastic_cell_categorization.xlsx', overwrite = T)

#### Shared coronary SMC clusters
all_datasets_cor <- readRDS("/faststorage/project/THOR/diana/integration_pigs_with_WT/integrated_pig_mice_hum/closer/more_closer/SMC/coronaries/after_bengal/r_py_all_datasets_processed_with_specific_clusters_coronary_2.rds")
my_data_cor <- all_datasets$many_higher_expr_seuratRPCA
my_data_cor$run <- 'coronary'

my_data <- my_data_cor[,my_data_cor$specificity_category == 'Shared']
DefaultAssay(my_data) <- 'integrated'
# my_data <- RunPCA(object = my_data, npcs = 40)
ElbowPlot(my_data, ndims = 40)
my_data <- 
  RunUMAP(object = my_data, reduction = "pca",
          dims = 1:16,
          verbose = FALSE) %>%
  FindNeighbors(reduction = "pca",
                dims = 1:16,
                verbose = FALSE) %>%
  FindClusters(resolution = c(0.1, 0.15,  0.2, 0.25, 0.3, 0.35),
               verbose = FALSE)


table(my_data$integrated_snn_res.0.3, my_data$species)
# my_data$species_run <- paste(my_data$species, my_data$run, sep = '_')
DimPlot_scCustom(my_data, group.by = 'integrated_snn_res.0.2',  reduction = 'umap') 

my_data$smc_phenotypes <- as.factor(as.character(my_data$smc_phenotypes))

DimPlot_scCustom(my_data, group.by = 'integrated_snn_res.0.2', reduction = 'umap') + DimPlot_scCustom(my_data, group.by = 'smc_phenotypes', reduction = 'umap') 
DimPlot_scCustom(my_data, group.by = 'integrated_snn_res.0.2', split.by = 'species', reduction = 'umap')
DimPlot_scCustom(my_data, group.by = 'smc_phenotypes', split.by = 'species', reduction = 'umap')
Idents(my_data) <- 'integrated_snn_res.0.2'
tmp <- FindAllMarkers(my_data, assay = 'RNA_genes', only.pos = T)

new_names <-
  c('Terminal',
    "Contractile",
    "Fibroblasts",
     "Transitional",
    'IFN_SMC'
    )
names(new_names) <- levels(Idents(my_data))

my_data <-
  Seurat::RenameIdents(object = my_data, new_names)
new_names <- Idents(my_data)
my_data$shared_clusters <-
  new_names
pal_celltypes_pig <- c("#E18727FF", "#0072B5FF",  "#BC3C29FF", "#20854EFF", "#7876B1FF" ,"#FFDC91FF", "#EE4C97FF")
p1 <- DimPlot_scCustom(my_data, group.by = 'shared_clusters', split.by = 'species', colors_use = pal_celltypes_pig[c(3,2,6,1,7)], aspect_ratio = 1, split_seurat = T)
p1
ggsave(filename = 'reclustered_shared_SMCs_split_Cor.pdf', plot = p1, width = 6, height = 6, units = 'cm', scale = 3)
# Make lists of genes that are conservatively expressed across species in the shared SMC phenotypes
gene_list <- list()
tmp <- list()

for (i in unique(my_data$shared_clusters)) {
  for (j in unique(my_data$species)) {
    exrMat <-
      GetAssayData(my_data[, my_data$shared_clusters == i &
                             my_data$species == j], slot = 'data', assay = 'RNA_genes')
    
    # Step 1: Determine if a gene is expressed in a cell
    # Assuming any value greater than 0 indicates expression
    is_expressed <- exrMat > 0
    
    # Step 2: Calculate the percentage of cells in which each gene is expressed
    percent_expressed <- rowSums(is_expressed) / ncol(exrMat) * 100
    
    # Step 3: Identify genes expressed in at least 20% of cells
    keep_genes <-
      names(percent_expressed)[percent_expressed >= 10]
    tmp[[j]] <- keep_genes
  }
   tmp_2 <-
   as.data.frame(sort(Reduce(intersect,list( tmp$sscrofa, tmp$hsapiens)), decreasing = F) )
   colnames(tmp_2) <- paste('conservative_genes', i)
  gene_list[[i]] <- tmp_2
}

openxlsx::write.xlsx(gene_list, file = 'conservative_genes_expressed_min10pct_per_phenotype_Cor_9010_cell_categorization.xlsx', overwrite = T)

table(my_data$integrated_snn_res.0.2, my_data$species)
# Make balanced dataset

my_data_balanced <- my_data[,colnames(my_data) %in% c(
  sample(names(my_data$species_2[my_data$species_2 == 'human' & my_data$shared_clusters == 'Terminal']), size = 200, replace = F),
  sample(names(my_data$species_2[my_data$species_2 == 'human' & my_data$shared_clusters == 'Contractile']), size = 200, replace = F),
  sample(names(my_data$species_2[my_data$species_2 == 'human' & my_data$shared_clusters == 'Fibroblasts']), size = 200, replace = F),
  sample(names(my_data$species_2[my_data$species_2 == 'human' & my_data$shared_clusters == 'Transitional']), size = 200, replace = F),
  sample(names(my_data$species_2[my_data$species_2 == 'human' & my_data$shared_clusters == 'IFN_SMC']), size = 10, replace = F),
  
  sample(names(my_data$species_2[my_data$species_2 == 'pig' & my_data$shared_clusters == 'Terminal']), size = 200, replace = F) ,
  sample(names(my_data$species_2[my_data$species_2 == 'pig' & my_data$shared_clusters == 'Contractile']), size = 200, replace = F) ,
  sample(names(my_data$species_2[my_data$species_2 == 'pig' & my_data$shared_clusters == 'Fibroblasts']), size = 200, replace = F) ,
  sample(names(my_data$species_2[my_data$species_2 == 'pig' & my_data$shared_clusters == 'Transitional']), size = 200, replace = F) ,
  sample(names(my_data$species_2[my_data$species_2 == 'pig' & my_data$shared_clusters == 'IFN_SMC']), size = 10, replace = F) 
  )]

table(my_data_balanced$species, my_data_balanced$shared_clusters)

DimPlot_scCustom(my_data_balanced, group.by = 'shared_clusters', split.by = 'species')

Idents(my_data_balanced) <- 'integrated_snn_res.0.2'
DefaultAssay(my_data_balanced) <- 'RNA_genes'

tmp <- FindAllMarkers(my_data_balanced, only.pos = T, min.pct = 0.3)
tmp <-  tmp[tmp$p_val_adj < 0.05,]
FeaturePlot_scCustom(my_data_balanced, features = c('THBS1', 'SERPINE2'), split.by = 'species')


#### DEseq2
final_species_genes <- readRDS("/faststorage/project/THOR/diana/integration_pigs_with_WT/integrated_pig_mice_hum/closer/more_closer/biomart_109_orth_new.rds")
final_species_genes$Human_gene_name_v98 <- ifelse(is.na(final_species_genes$Human_gene_name_v98) == TRUE, final_species_genes$`Human Ensembl ID`, final_species_genes$Human_gene_name_v98)
final_species_genes$Human_gene_name_v98 <- ifelse(final_species_genes$Human_gene_name_v98 == '', final_species_genes$`Human Ensembl ID`, final_species_genes$Human_gene_name_v98)

CreatePseudoBulkData <- function(raw.data,normalized.data,sample.id,fun="sum")
{
    # fun can be "sum" or "mean"
    library(muscat)
    library(SingleCellExperiment)
    
    if (fun=="sum")
    {
        sce <- SingleCellExperiment(assays=list(counts=raw.data),colData=DataFrame(sample_id=sample.id))
    } else if (fun=="mean") {
        sce <- SingleCellExperiment(assays=list(counts=normalized.data),colData=DataFrame(sample_id=sample.id))
    }
    pb <- aggregateData(sce, assay = "counts", fun=fun, by=c("sample_id"))
    return(pb)
}
    
# Make counts slot with gene names
my_counts <-
  GetAssayData(object = my_data_balanced,
               assay = 'RNA',
               slot = 'counts')
rownames(my_counts) <-
  gsub(pattern = '-0',
       replacement = '',
       x = rownames(my_counts))
rownames(my_counts) %in% final_species_genes$`Pig Ensembl ID` %>% table()
rownames(my_counts)[!rownames(my_counts) %in% final_species_genes$`Pig Ensembl ID`]

my_counts <-
  my_counts[rownames(my_counts)[rownames(my_counts) %in% final_species_genes$`Pig Ensembl ID`],]

rownames(final_species_genes) <-
  final_species_genes$`Pig Ensembl ID`
df <-
  data.frame(
    pig_ens_data = rownames(my_counts),
    transl_human_gene = final_species_genes[rownames(my_counts), 'Human_gene_name_v98'],
    transl_hum_ens = final_species_genes[rownames(my_counts), 'Human Ensembl ID']
  )

rownames(df) <- df$pig_ens_data
rownames(my_counts) <-
  df[rownames(my_counts), 'transl_human_gene']

# Run DESeq2 across species within each shared SMC cluster (pairwise)
deseq2_res <- list()
for(i in unique(my_data_balanced$shared_clusters)) {
  my_data_balanced_subset <-
    my_data_balanced[, my_data_balanced$shared_clusters == i]
  pb <-
    CreatePseudoBulkData(
      raw.data = my_counts[, colnames(my_counts) %in% colnames(my_data_balanced_subset)],
      sample.id = my_data_balanced_subset$orig.ident,
      fun = 'sum'
    )
  
  bca <-
    as.data.frame.matrix(table(my_data_balanced_subset$orig.ident, my_data_balanced_subset$species_2))
  group <- apply(bca, 1, function(x)
    colnames(bca)[which.max(x)])
  
  
  #Make the model and contrast for statistical testing
  df_con <- DataFrame(condition = factor(group))
  pb_counts <- assay(pb)
  mode(pb_counts) <- "integer"
  dge <- DESeqDataSetFromMatrix(pb_counts,
                                colData = df_con,
                                design = ~ 0 + condition)
  dds <- DESeq(dge, betaPrior = FALSE)
  
  hp_res <-
    results(
      dds,
      contrast = c("condition", "human", "pig"),
      independentFiltering = TRUE,
      alpha = 0.05,
      pAdjustMethod = "BH",
      parallel = FALSE
    )
  hp_res <-
    lfcShrink(
      dds,
      contrast = c("condition", "human", "pig"),
      res = hp_res,
      type = 'ashr'
    )
  hp_res <-
    as.data.frame(hp_res@listData, row.names = hp_res@rownames)
  
  
  colnames(hp_res) <- paste('HP', colnames(hp_res), sep = '_')
  
  
  res_all_org <- cbind(hp_res)
  res_all_org$gene <- rownames(res_all_org)
  res_all_org$exp_PIG <- rowMeans2(expm1(subset(my_data_balanced_subset, species_2 == 'pig')[["RNA_genes"]]@data[rownames(res_all_org), ]))
  res_all_org$exp_HUMAN <- rowMeans2(expm1(subset(my_data_balanced_subset, species_2 == 'human')[["RNA_genes"]]@data[rownames(res_all_org), ]))
  
  res_all_org$pct_PIG <- rowSums(subset(my_data_balanced_subset, species_2 == 'pig')[["RNA_genes"]]@data[rownames(res_all_org), ] > 0) / ncol(subset(my_data_balanced_subset, species_2 == 'pig')[["RNA_genes"]]@data[rownames(res_all_org), ] > 0) * 100
  res_all_org$pct_HUMAN <- rowSums(subset(my_data_balanced_subset, species_2 == 'human')[["RNA_genes"]]@data[rownames(res_all_org), ] > 0) / ncol(subset(my_data_balanced_subset, species_2 == 'human')[["RNA_genes"]]@data[rownames(res_all_org), ] > 0) * 100

  deseq2_res[[i]] <- res_all_org
}
saveRDS(deseq2_res, file = 'deseq2.pairwise.shared.SMC.clusters_Coronary_9010_cell_categorization.rds')
write.xlsx(deseq2_res, 'deseq2.pairwise.shared.SMC.clusters_Coronary_9010_cell_categorization.xlsx', overwrite = T)
saveRDS(my_data, 'shared_Cor_HE_RPCA_cell_categorization.rds')
```


```{r}
## Rank comparison
# avex <- AverageExpression(my_data, assays = 'RNA_genes', group.by = 'orig.ident', slot = 'data')
# avex2 <- apply(avex$RNA_genes, 2, rank_my)
# bca <- as.data.frame.matrix(table(my_data$orig.ident, my_data$species))
# nl<- apply(bca, 1, function(x) colnames(bca)[which.max(x)])
# avex4 <- avex2[!(rowMax(avex2) < 0.33),]


minMax <- function(x) {
  (x - min(x)) / (max(x) - min(x))
}
rank_my <- function(x) {
  rank(x) / length(x)
}


rank_test <- list()
for(i in unique(my_data_balanced$shared_clusters)) {
  my_data_subset <- my_data_balanced[,my_data_balanced$shared_clusters == i]
  avex <-
    AverageExpression(my_data_subset,
                      assays = 'RNA_genes',
                      group.by = 'orig.ident',
                      slot = 'data')
  
  
  #rank data using custom function
  avex2 <- apply(avex$RNA_genes, 2, rank_my)
  avex4 <- avex2[!(rowMax(avex2) < 0.33),]
  
  bca <-
    as.data.frame.matrix(table(my_data_subset$orig.ident, my_data_subset$species))
  nl <- apply(bca, 1, function(x)
    colnames(bca)[which.max(x)])
  
  kr.test <- apply(avex4, 1, function(x) {
  res <- kruskal.test(x ~ nl)
  return(c(res$statistic, res$p.value))
})
  kr.test <- data.frame(t(kr.test))
  colnames(kr.test) <- c("kr.chisq", "kr.p.value")
  kr.test$kr.p.fdr <- p.adjust(kr.test$kr.p.value, method = "fdr")
  table(kr.test$kr.p.fdr < 0.05)
  kr.test$gene <- rownames(kr.test)
  
  # ## Wilcox test
  # wilc.test.res <- apply(avex4, 1, function(x) {
  #   res <-
  #     pairwise.wilcox.test(x, g = nl, p.adjust.method = "bonferroni")
  #   return(c(res$p.value[1, 1], res$p.value[2, 1], res$p.value[2, 2]))
  # })
  # wilc.test.res <- data.frame(t(wilc.test.res))
  # colnames(wilc.test.res) <-
  #   c("wilcox.p.val.hm", "wilcox.p.val.hp", "wilcox.p.val.pm")
  # wilc.test.res$wilcox.p.val.hm.fdr <-
  #   p.adjust(wilc.test.res$wilcox.p.val.hm, method = "fdr")
  # wilc.test.res$wilcox.p.val.hp.fdr <-
  #   p.adjust(wilc.test.res$wilcox.p.val.hp, method = "fdr")
  # wilc.test.res$wilcox.p.val.pm.fdr <-
  #   p.adjust(wilc.test.res$wilcox.p.val.pm, method = "fdr")
  # wilc.test.res$gene <- rownames(wilc.test.res)
  
  ### t test
  t.test_res <- apply(avex4, 1, function(x) {
    res <- pairwise.t.test(x, g = nl, p.adjust.method = "bonferroni")
    return(c(res$p.value[1, 1], res$p.value[2, 1], res$p.value[2, 2]))
  })
  t.test_res <- data.frame(t(t.test_res))
  colnames(t.test_res) <-
    c("t.test.p.val.hm", "t.test.p.val.hp", "t.test.p.val.pm")
  t.test_res$t.test.p.val.hm.fdr <-
    p.adjust(t.test_res$t.test.p.val.hm, method = "fdr")
  t.test_res$t.test.p.val.hp.fdr <-
    p.adjust(t.test_res$t.test.p.val.hp, method = "fdr")
  t.test_res$t.test.p.val.pm.fdr <-
    p.adjust(t.test_res$t.test.p.val.pm, method = "fdr")
  
  table(t.test_res$t.test.p.val.hm.fdr > 0.05)
  table(t.test_res$t.test.p.val.hp.fdr > 0.05)
  table(t.test_res$t.test.p.val.pm.fdr > 0.05)
  
  t.test_res$gene <- rownames(t.test_res)
  
  avex5 <- merge.data.frame(x =  t.test_res, y= c(  kr.test), by = 'gene', all = T)
  
  avex5 <- column_to_rownames(avex5, var = 'gene')
  avex5$exp_PIG <- rowMeans2(expm1(subset(my_data_subset, species == 'pig')[["RNA_genes"]]@data[rownames(avex5), ]))
  avex5$exp_HUMAN <- rowMeans2(expm1(subset(my_data_subset, species == 'human')[["RNA_genes"]]@data[rownames(avex5), ]))
  avex5$exp_MOUSE <- rowMeans2(expm1(subset(my_data_subset, species == 'mouse')[["RNA_genes"]]@data[rownames(avex5), ]))
  
  avex5$pct_PIG <- rowSums(subset(my_data_subset, species == 'pig')[["RNA_genes"]]@data[rownames(avex5), ] > 0) / ncol(subset(my_data_subset, species == 'pig')[["RNA_genes"]]@data[rownames(avex5), ] > 0) * 100
  avex5$pct_HUMAN <- rowSums(subset(my_data_subset, species == 'human')[["RNA_genes"]]@data[rownames(avex5), ] > 0) / ncol(subset(my_data_subset, species == 'human')[["RNA_genes"]]@data[rownames(avex5), ] > 0) * 100
  avex5$pct_MOUSE <- rowSums(subset(my_data_subset, species == 'mouse')[["RNA_genes"]]@data[rownames(avex5), ] > 0) / ncol(subset(my_data_subset, species == 'mouse')[["RNA_genes"]]@data[rownames(avex5), ] > 0) * 100
  
  avex5$gene <- rownames(avex5)
  rank_test[[i]] <- avex5
}

write.xlsx(rank_test, 'perc.rank.pairwise.shared.SMC.clusters_categorization.xlsx', overwrite = T)

```

```{r}
deseq2_res <- readRDS("/faststorage/project/THOR/diana/integration_pigs_with_WT/integrated_pig_mice_hum/closer/more_closer/SMC/after_bengal/cluster_specificity/deseq2.pairwise.shared.SMC.clusters_Elastic_cell_categorization.rds")


# Correlation of ranked genes
avex <- AverageExpression(my_data, assays = 'RNA_genes', group.by = 'orig.ident', slot = 'data')

# Filter out house-keeping genes
HKG <- intersect(na.omit(deseq2_res$Contractile[deseq2_res$Contractile$HP_padj > 0.05 & 
             deseq2_res$Contractile$HM_padj > 0.05 &
           deseq2_res$Contractile$PM_padj > 0.05, 'gene' ]),  
           
           c( 
           
          na.omit( deseq2_res$Transitional[deseq2_res$Transitional$HP_padj > 0.05 & 
             deseq2_res$Transitional$HM_padj > 0.05 &
           deseq2_res$Transitional$PM_padj > 0.05, 'gene']),
           
          na.omit( deseq2_res$Terminal[deseq2_res$Terminal$HP_padj > 0.05 & 
             deseq2_res$Terminal$HM_padj > 0.05 &
           deseq2_res$Terminal$PM_padj > 0.05, 'gene']) ,
          
          na.omit( deseq2_res$Proliferating[deseq2_res$Terminal$HP_padj > 0.05 & 
             deseq2_res$Proliferating$HM_padj > 0.05 &
           deseq2_res$Proliferating$PM_padj > 0.05, 'gene']) ))
           





#### loop across clusters
correl_rank <- list()
for(i in unique(my_data_balanced$shared_clusters)) {
  my_data_subset <- my_data_balanced[,my_data_balanced$shared_clusters == i]
  avex <-
    AverageExpression(my_data_subset,
                      assays = 'RNA_genes',
                      group.by = 'orig.ident',
                      slot = 'data')
  
  avex <- avex[["RNA_genes"]][! rownames(avex[["RNA_genes"]]) %in% HKG, ]
  #rank data using custom function
  avex2 <- apply(avex, 2, rank_my)
  avex2 <- avex2[!(rowMax(avex2) < 0.33),]
  
  bca <-
    as.data.frame.matrix(table(my_data_subset$orig.ident, my_data_subset$species))
  nl <- apply(bca, 1, function(x)
    colnames(bca)[which.max(x)])
  
  avex_avg <- data.frame(
    human = rowMeans(avex2[, nl == "human"]),
    mouse = rowMeans(avex2[, nl == "mouse"]),
    pig = rowMeans(avex2[, nl == "pig"])
  )

  # Convert the matrix to a long format data frame

  mat_long <- as.data.frame(cor(avex_avg)) %>%
    tibble::rownames_to_column(var = "Species1") %>%
    pivot_longer(cols = -Species1,
                 names_to = "Species2",
                 values_to = "Value")
  mat_long$IsDiagonal <- mat_long$Species1 == mat_long$Species2

  p <- ggplot(mat_long, aes(x = Species1, y = Species2, fill = Value)) +
  geom_tile(color = "white", aes(alpha = IsDiagonal)) +  # Control tile appearance
     scale_alpha_manual(values = c(1, 0), guide = "none") +  # Make diagonal tiles fully transparent and remove legend
  geom_text(data = subset(mat_long, !IsDiagonal),  # Exclude diagonal from text plotting
            aes(label = sprintf("%.2f", Value)), color = "black", size = 4) +
  scale_fill_gradientn(colors = colorRampPalette(rev(brewer.pal(9, "PuBuGn")))(100))  +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, vjust = 1),
        axis.text.y = element_text(angle = 0, hjust = 1)) +
  labs(title = paste('Shared SMC cluster', i), fill = "Correlation", x = NULL, y = NULL) +
     geom_text(aes(label = sprintf("%.2f", Value)), color = "black", size = 4)   # Text labels
  
   correl_rank[[i]] <- p
}

p <- plot_grid(plotlist = correl_rank, nrow = 2, ncol = 2, align = 'hv',  axis = 'b', greedy = T, label_fontfamily = 'Helvetica', label_x = -0.1)
print(p)
saveRDS(p, 'correlation_shared_SMC_phenotypes_LIST_categorization.rds')
p <- readRDS("/faststorage/project/THOR/diana/integration_pigs_with_WT/integrated_pig_mice_hum/closer/more_closer/SMC/after_bengal/cluster_specificity/correlation_shared_SMC_phenotypes_LIST.rds")

ggsave(filename = 'correlation_shared_SMC_phenotypes_categorization.pdf',  plot = p, device = 'pdf', units = 'cm', dpi = 400, width = 16, height = 14, scale = 1.5)
```


# To find out markers for species-specific populations, I will go back to individual datasets. Integrated datasets do not have all genes, but only those that are expressed in all 3 species, while it can be important to have genes expressed solely in some species

```{r}
Idents(my_data) <- 'specificity_category'

tmp <- FindAllMarkers(object = my_data, assay = 'RNA_genes', only.pos = T)
tmp <- tmp[tmp$p_val_adj < 0.05,]

View(tmp[tmp$cluster == 'mmusculus-specific', c(2,3,4,6,7)]) ## IBSP, PTH1R, MIA, COMP, BMP2

table( my_data$smc_phenotypes ,my_data$specificity_category) 
```

# UMAPs of the individual datasets with highlighted species-specific and shared clusters (based on barcodes)


```{r}
mouse <- readRDS("/faststorage/project/THOR/diana/integration_pigs_with_WT/integrated_pig_mice_hum/closer/more_closer/mouse/smc_plaque_Alencar_seurat.rds")
human <-  readRDS("/faststorage/project/THOR/diana/integration_pigs_with_WT/integrated_pig_mice_hum/closer/more_closer/human/athero_comb_smc_seurat.rds")
pig <- readRDS("/faststorage/project/THOR/diana/integration_pigs_with_WT/Pigs/Pigs_regression/Carlos_new_analysis/SC.Analysis.V4.ThirdPass.RNA.New/SMC/bengal/pig_plaque_seurat.rds")
```

# Use HE scVI integareted datasets 

```{r}
dim(mouse) # 2412 cells

mouse$specificity <- rep(NA, length(mouse$orig.ident))
human$specificity <- rep(NA, length(human$orig.ident))
pig$specificity <- rep(NA, length(pig$orig.ident))

# all_datasets_el$many_higher_expr_scVI$specificity_category <- my_data$consensus[colnames(all_datasets_el$many_higher_expr_scVI)]
# all_datasets_el$many_higher_expr_scVI$specificity_category <- factor(all_datasets_el$many_higher_expr_scVI$specificity_category)

# Transfer **shared** cluster to all individual species datasets
my_vec <-
      names(all_datasets_el$many_higher_expr_scVI$specificity_category[all_datasets_el$many_higher_expr_scVI$specificity_category == 'Shared']) %>% na.omit()
    my_vec <- gsub('-mmusculus', replacement = '', x = my_vec)
    names(my_vec) <- my_vec
    mouse$specificity <-
      ifelse(colnames(mouse) %in% names(my_vec), 'Shared', mouse$specificity)

my_vec <-
      names(all_datasets_el$many_higher_expr_scVI$specificity_category[all_datasets_el$many_higher_expr_scVI$specificity_category == 'Shared']) %>% na.omit()
    my_vec <- gsub('-hsapiens', replacement = '', x = my_vec)
    names(my_vec) <- my_vec
    human$specificity <-
      ifelse(colnames(human) %in% names(my_vec), 'Shared', human$specificity)

my_vec <-
      names(all_datasets_el$many_higher_expr_scVI$specificity_category[all_datasets_el$many_higher_expr_scVI$specificity_category == 'Shared']) %>% na.omit()
    my_vec <- gsub('-sscrofa', replacement = '', x = my_vec)
    names(my_vec) <- my_vec
    pig$specificity <-
      ifelse(colnames(pig) %in% names(my_vec), 'Shared', pig$specificity)
        
# **hsapiens-sscrofa-specific**
    
my_vec <-
      names(all_datasets_el$many_higher_expr_scVI$specificity_category[all_datasets_el$many_higher_expr_scVI$specificity_category == 'Human_pig_specific']) %>% na.omit()
    my_vec <- gsub('-hsapiens', replacement = '', x = my_vec)
    names(my_vec) <- my_vec
    human$specificity <-
      ifelse(colnames(human) %in% names(my_vec), 'Human_pig_specific', human$specificity)

my_vec <-
      names(all_datasets_el$many_higher_expr_scVI$specificity_category[all_datasets_el$many_higher_expr_scVI$specificity_category == 'Human_pig_specific']) %>% na.omit()
    my_vec <- gsub('-sscrofa', replacement = '', x = my_vec)
    names(my_vec) <- my_vec
    pig$specificity <-
      ifelse(colnames(pig) %in% names(my_vec), 'Human_pig_specific', pig$specificity)

my_vec <-
      names(all_datasets_el$many_higher_expr_scVI$specificity_category[all_datasets_el$many_higher_expr_scVI$specificity_category == 'Human_pig_specific']) %>% na.omit()
    my_vec <- gsub('-mmusculus', replacement = '', x = my_vec)
    names(my_vec) <- my_vec
    mouse$specificity <-
      ifelse(colnames(mouse) %in% names(my_vec), 'Human_pig_specific', mouse$specificity)
    
    
# mmusculus-specific
my_vec <-
      names(all_datasets_el$many_higher_expr_scVI$specificity_category[all_datasets_el$many_higher_expr_scVI$specificity_category == 'Mouse_specific']) %>% na.omit()
    my_vec <- gsub('-mmusculus', replacement = '', x = my_vec)
    names(my_vec) <- my_vec
    mouse$specificity <-
      ifelse(colnames(mouse) %in% names(my_vec), 'Mouse_specific', mouse$specificity) # Mouse contractile cells contribute to hsapiens-sscrofa-specific
    
my_vec <-
      names(all_datasets_el$many_higher_expr_scVI$specificity_category[all_datasets_el$many_higher_expr_scVI$specificity_category == 'Mouse_specific']) %>% na.omit()
    my_vec <- gsub('-hsapiens', replacement = '', x = my_vec)
    names(my_vec) <- my_vec
    human$specificity <-
      ifelse(colnames(human) %in% names(my_vec), 'Mouse_specific', human$specificity)

my_vec <-
      names(all_datasets_el$many_higher_expr_scVI$specificity_category[all_datasets_el$many_higher_expr_scVI$specificity_category == 'Mouse_specific']) %>% na.omit()
    my_vec <- gsub('-sscrofa', replacement = '', x = my_vec)
    names(my_vec) <- my_vec
    pig$specificity <-
      ifelse(colnames(pig) %in% names(my_vec), 'Mouse_specific', pig$specificity)
    
    
    
    
# hsapiens-specific
my_vec <-
      names(all_datasets_el$many_higher_expr_scVI$specificity_category[all_datasets_el$many_higher_expr_scVI$specificity_category == 'Human_specific']) %>% na.omit()
    my_vec <- gsub('-hsapiens', replacement = '', x = my_vec)
    names(my_vec) <- my_vec
    human$specificity <-
      ifelse(colnames(human) %in% names(my_vec), 'Human_specific', human$specificity)

my_vec <-
      names(all_datasets_el$many_higher_expr_scVI$specificity_category[all_datasets_el$many_higher_expr_scVI$specificity_category == 'Human_specific']) %>% na.omit()
    my_vec <- gsub('-sscrofa', replacement = '', x = my_vec)
    names(my_vec) <- my_vec
    pig$specificity <-
      ifelse(colnames(pig) %in% names(my_vec), 'Human_specific', pig$specificity)

my_vec <-
      names(all_datasets_el$many_higher_expr_scVI$specificity_category[all_datasets_el$many_higher_expr_scVI$specificity_category == 'Human_specific']) %>% na.omit()
    my_vec <- gsub('-mmusculus', replacement = '', x = my_vec)
    names(my_vec) <- my_vec
    mouse$specificity <-
      ifelse(colnames(mouse) %in% names(my_vec), 'Human_specific', mouse$specificity) 
    
# **Mouse_human_specific**
my_vec <-
      names(all_datasets_el$many_higher_expr_scVI$specificity_category[all_datasets_el$many_higher_expr_scVI$specificity_category == 'Mouse_human_specific']) %>% na.omit()
    my_vec <- gsub('-hsapiens', replacement = '', x = my_vec)
    names(my_vec) <- my_vec
    human$specificity <-
      ifelse(colnames(human) %in% names(my_vec), 'Mouse_human_specific', human$specificity)

my_vec <-
      names(all_datasets_el$many_higher_expr_scVI$specificity_category[all_datasets_el$many_higher_expr_scVI$specificity_category == 'Mouse_human_specific']) %>% na.omit()
    my_vec <- gsub('-mmusculus', replacement = '', x = my_vec)
    names(my_vec) <- my_vec
    mouse$specificity <-
      ifelse(colnames(mouse) %in% names(my_vec), 'Mouse_human_specific', mouse$specificity)

my_vec <-
      names(all_datasets_el$many_higher_expr_scVI$specificity_category[all_datasets_el$many_higher_expr_scVI$specificity_category == 'Mouse_human_specific']) %>% na.omit()
    my_vec <- gsub('-sscrofa', replacement = '', x = my_vec)
    names(my_vec) <- my_vec
    pig$specificity <-
      ifelse(colnames(pig) %in% names(my_vec), 'Mouse_human_specific', pig$specificity)
    
    
# Non significant
my_vec <-
      names(all_datasets_el$many_higher_expr_scVI$specificity_category[all_datasets_el$many_higher_expr_scVI$specificity_category == 'NS']) %>% na.omit()
    my_vec <- gsub('-hsapiens', replacement = '', x = my_vec)
    names(my_vec) <- my_vec
    human$specificity <-
      ifelse(colnames(human) %in% names(my_vec), 'Small_contribution', human$specificity)

my_vec <-
      names(all_datasets_el$many_higher_expr_scVI$specificity_category[all_datasets_el$many_higher_expr_scVI$specificity_category == 'NS']) %>% na.omit()
    my_vec <- gsub('-mmusculus', replacement = '', x = my_vec)
    names(my_vec) <- my_vec
    mouse$specificity <-
      ifelse(colnames(mouse) %in% names(my_vec), 'Small_contribution', mouse$specificity)
    
my_vec <-
      names(all_datasets_el$many_higher_expr_scVI$specificity_category[all_datasets_el$many_higher_expr_scVI$specificity_category == 'NS']) %>% na.omit()
    my_vec <- gsub('-sscrofa', replacement = '', x = my_vec)
    names(my_vec) <- my_vec
    pig$specificity <-
      ifelse(colnames(pig) %in% names(my_vec), 'Small_contribution', pig$specificity)
```

```{r}
saveRDS(list(Mouse = mouse$specificity, Human = human$specificity, Pig = pig$specificity), file = 'vector_of_specificity.rds')
```

```{r}
my_data <- readRDS("/faststorage/project/THOR/diana/integration_pigs_with_WT/integrated_pig_mice_hum/closer/more_closer/SMC/after_bengal/cluster_specificity/HE_RPCA_cell_categorization.rds")
```


```{r}
pal_species <- readRDS("/faststorage/project/THOR/diana/integration_pigs_with_WT/integrated_pig_mice_hum/closer/more_closer/SMC/after_bengal/cluster_specificity/pal_species.rds")

# plots smc_phenotypes + specificIty on individual datasets
# pal_specificity <- met.brewer(name = 'Cross', n = 9, direction = -1)
# pal_specificity <-
#   c(
#     met.brewer(
#       name = 'Cross',
#       n = 9,
#       direction = -1
#     )[c(5, 9)],
#     "#20854EFF",
#     "#00A087FF",
#     met.brewer(
#       name = 'Demuth',
#       n = 8,
#       direction = -1
#     )[c(4, 3, 2, 7)],
#     "#7876B1FF"
#   )

# Example of a nice 9-color palette in R
# Example 9-color palette, slightly brighter
# Combine 3-step purple gradient + 6 NPG-inspired colors
pal_specificity <- c('#C1C8D9', '#8491B4df',  '#4f576c',
  # 3 purples in a gradient
  # "#CBD5E1",  # light gray-blue
  # "#94A3B8",  # medium gray-blue
  # "#64748B",  # darker gray-blue
  pal_npg("nrc")(10)[c(1,2,3,10,5,7,8,9)]
  # 6 colors adapted from an NPG-like palette
 #  "#E64B35",  # vivid red
 #  "#4DBBD5",  # teal
 #  "#00A087",  # greenish-teal
 # "#FFDC91FF", 
 #  "#F39B7F",  # peach/orange
 #  "#7E6148"   # subdued brown
)


# "#E64B35FF" "#4DBBD5FF" "#00A087FF" "#3C5488FF" "#F39B7FFF" "#8491B4FF"
# pal_specificity <- c( "#CBD5E1",  # light gray-blue
#   "#94A3B8",  # medium gray-blue
#   "#64748B", brewer.pal(n = 9, name = 'Paired' )[3:9]) 


names(pal_specificity) <- c('Contractile', 'Transitional', 'Terminal',  'Pericytes_Human_pig_specific', 'DLX5_SMC_Human_specific','Terminal_Mouse_specific', 'Proliferating', 'Contractile_Human_pig_specific',   'Too_small_cluster')

pal_celltypes_pig <- c("#E18727FF", "#0072B5FF",  "#BC3C29FF", "#20854EFF", "#7876B1FF" ,"#FFDC91FF", "#EE4C97FF")

pal_celltypes_human <- c("#0072B5FF", "#BC3C29FF" ,"#E18727FF", "#80796BFF", "#20854EFF",  "#374E55FF")

pal_celltypes_mouse <- c("#E18727FF","#BC3C29FF",  "#0072B5FF", "#79AF97FF")


mouse$smc_phenotypes_specificity <- paste(mouse$smc_phenotypes, mouse$specificity, sep = '_') # Mouse Contractile and Contractile_Rgs5 contribure to pig-human contractile, but too little in comparison with human and pig

human$smc_phenotypes_specificity <- paste(human$smc_phenotypes, human$specificity, sep = '_')
pig$smc_phenotypes_specificity <- paste(pig$smc_phenotypes, pig$specificity, sep = '_')

my_vec <- c('Contractile_Human_pig_specific', 'DLX5_SMC_Human_specific', 'Pericytes_Human_pig_specific', 'Terminal_Mouse_specific')
mouse$for_heatmap <- ifelse(mouse$smc_phenotypes_specificity %in% my_vec, mouse$smc_phenotypes_specificity, 'Shared')
pig$for_heatmap <- ifelse(pig$smc_phenotypes_specificity %in% my_vec, pig$smc_phenotypes_specificity, 'Shared')
human$for_heatmap <- ifelse(human$smc_phenotypes_specificity %in% my_vec, human$smc_phenotypes_specificity, 'Shared')

## Divide 'Shared' into sub-phenotypes
head(colnames(mouse))
head(colnames(human))
head(colnames(pig))

#Mouse
xxx <- my_data[, my_data$species == 'mouse']$shared_clusters 
names(xxx) <-  substr(names(xxx), start = 1, stop = 16)
xxx <- xxx[substr(colnames(mouse), start = 1, stop = 16)]
names(xxx) <- colnames(mouse)
mouse$shared_clusters <- xxx
mouse$shared_clusters <- as.character(mouse$shared_clusters)
mouse$shared_clusters[is.na(mouse$shared_clusters)] <- 'specific'
table(mouse$shared_clusters, mouse$smc_phenotypes)

mouse$shared_clusters <- ifelse(mouse$shared_clusters == 'specific', mouse$specificity, no = mouse$shared_clusters)
mouse$shared_clusters[mouse$shared_clusters == 'Mouse_specific'] <- 'Terminal_Mouse_specific'
mouse$shared_clusters[mouse$shared_clusters == 'Human_pig_specific'] <- 'Contractile_Human_pig_specific'

# Pig
xxx <- my_data[, my_data$species == 'pig']$shared_clusters 
names(xxx) <-  substr(names(xxx), start = 1, stop = 16)
xxx <- xxx[substr(colnames(pig), start = 1, stop = 16)]
names(xxx) <- colnames(pig)
pig$shared_clusters <- xxx
pig$shared_clusters <- as.character(pig$shared_clusters)
pig$shared_clusters[is.na(pig$shared_clusters)] <- 'specific'
table(pig$shared_clusters, pig$smc_phenotypes)

pig$shared_clusters <- ifelse(pig$shared_clusters == 'specific', pig$specificity, no = pig$shared_clusters)
pig$shared_clusters[pig$smc_phenotypes == 'Pericytes'] <- 'Pericytes_Human_pig_specific' 
pig$shared_clusters[pig$shared_clusters == 'Human_pig_specific'] <- 'Contractile_Human_pig_specific' 
pig$shared_clusters[pig$shared_clusters == 'Mouse_specific'] <- 'Terminal_Mouse_specific' 
table(pig$shared_clusters)
table(pig$shared_clusters, pig$smc_phenotypes)

# Human
xxx <- my_data[, my_data$species == 'human']$shared_clusters 
names(xxx) <-  substr(names(xxx), start = 12, stop = 27)
xxx <- xxx[substr(colnames(human), start = 12, stop = 27)]
names(xxx) <- colnames(human)
human$shared_clusters <- xxx
human$shared_clusters <- as.character(human$shared_clusters)
human$shared_clusters[is.na(human$shared_clusters)] <- 'specific'
table(human$shared_clusters, human$smc_phenotypes)

human$shared_clusters <- ifelse(human$shared_clusters == 'specific', human$specificity, no = human$shared_clusters)
human$shared_clusters[human$smc_phenotypes == 'Pericytes'] <- 'Pericytes_Human_pig_specific' 
human$shared_clusters[human$shared_clusters == 'Human_pig_specific'] <- 'Contractile_Human_pig_specific' 
human$shared_clusters[human$shared_clusters == 'Human_specific'] <- 'DLX5_SMC_Human_specific'
human$shared_clusters[is.na(human$shared_clusters)==TRUE] <- 'Too_small_cluster'
table(human$shared_clusters)
table(human$shared_clusters, human$smc_phenotypes)


##### Mouse
spec_mouse = DimPlot_scCustom(
  mouse,
    reduction = 'umap',
    group.by = c('shared_clusters'),
    pt.size = 0.5,
    shuffle = TRUE, label = T, label.box = T,  colors_use = pal_specificity, repel = T, label.size = 2.7
  ) + 
    theme(legend.position = 'none') +
   text_sizes + theme(plot.title = element_blank()) + 
    # guides(color = guide_legend(nrow = 3)) +
  #    plot_annotation(title =  new_names[name]) +  
  # theme(text = element_text(size = 10)) +
      scale_color_manual(values = pal_specificity) + 
  theme(aspect.ratio = 1,
      axis.line = element_blank(),
      axis.text.y = element_blank(),
      axis.ticks = element_blank(),
      axis.text.x = element_blank(),
      axis.title.x = element_blank(),
      axis.title.y = element_blank()
    )
  
  
  smc_mouse = DimPlot_scCustom(mouse,
    reduction = 'umap',
    group.by = 'smc_phenotypes',
    pt.size = 0.5,
    shuffle = TRUE, label = T, label.box = T, colors_use = pal_celltypes_mouse, repel = T, label.size = 2.7
  ) + NoLegend()+
    # guides(color = guide_legend(nrow = 6)) +
    # theme(legend.position = 'none', legend.text = element_text(size = 9)) +  
    theme(plot.title = element_blank()) + 
    scale_color_manual(values = pal_celltypes_mouse) +
    theme(aspect.ratio = 1,
      axis.line = element_blank(),
      axis.text.y = element_blank(),
      axis.ticks = element_blank(),
      axis.text.x = element_blank(),
      axis.title.x = element_blank(),
      axis.title.y = element_blank()
    )

##### Pig
spec_pig = DimPlot_scCustom(
  pig,
    reduction = 'umap',
    group.by = c('shared_clusters'),
    pt.size = 0.5,
    shuffle = TRUE, label = T, label.box = T,  colors_use = pal_specificity, repel = T, label.size = 2.7
  ) + 
    theme(legend.position = 'none') +
   text_sizes + theme(plot.title = element_blank()) + 
    # guides(color = guide_legend(nrow = 3)) +
  #    plot_annotation(title =  new_names[name]) +  
  # theme(text = element_text(size = 10)) +
      scale_color_manual(values = pal_specificity) + 
  theme(aspect.ratio = 1,
      axis.line = element_blank(),
      axis.text.y = element_blank(),
      axis.ticks = element_blank(),
      axis.text.x = element_blank(),
      axis.title.x = element_blank(),
      axis.title.y = element_blank()
    )
  
  
  smc_pig = DimPlot_scCustom(pig,
    reduction = 'umap',
    group.by = 'smc_phenotypes',
    pt.size = 0.5,
    shuffle = TRUE, label = T, label.box = T, colors_use = pal_celltypes_pig, repel = T, label.size = 2.7
  ) + NoLegend()+
    # guides(color = guide_legend(nrow = 6)) +
    # theme(legend.position = 'none', legend.text = element_text(size = 9)) +  
    theme(plot.title = element_blank()) + 
    scale_color_manual(values = pal_celltypes_pig) +
    theme(aspect.ratio = 1,
      axis.line = element_blank(),
      axis.text.y = element_blank(),
      axis.ticks = element_blank(),
      axis.text.x = element_blank(),
      axis.title.x = element_blank(),
      axis.title.y = element_blank()
    )
###### Human
spec_human = DimPlot_scCustom(
  human,
    reduction = 'umap',
    group.by = c('shared_clusters'),
    pt.size = 0.5,
    shuffle = TRUE, label = T, label.box = T,  colors_use = pal_specificity, repel = T, label.size = 2.7
  ) + 
    theme(legend.position = 'none') +
   text_sizes + theme(plot.title = element_blank()) + 
    # guides(color = guide_legend(nrow = 3)) +
  #    plot_annotation(title =  new_names[name]) +  
  # theme(text = element_text(size = 10)) +
      scale_color_manual(values = pal_specificity) + 
  theme(aspect.ratio = 1,
      axis.line = element_blank(),
      axis.text.y = element_blank(),
      axis.ticks = element_blank(),
      axis.text.x = element_blank(),
      axis.title.x = element_blank(),
      axis.title.y = element_blank()
    )
  
  
  smc_human = DimPlot_scCustom(human,
    reduction = 'umap',
    group.by = 'smc_phenotypes',
    pt.size = 0.5,
    shuffle = TRUE, label = T, label.box = T, colors_use = pal_celltypes_human, repel = T, label.size = 2.7
  ) + NoLegend()+
    # guides(color = guide_legend(nrow = 6)) +
    # theme(legend.position = 'none', legend.text = element_text(size = 9)) +  
    theme(plot.title = element_blank()) + 
    scale_color_manual(values = pal_celltypes_human) +
    theme(aspect.ratio = 1,
      axis.line = element_blank(),
      axis.text.y = element_blank(),
      axis.ticks = element_blank(),
      axis.text.x = element_blank(),
      axis.title.x = element_blank(),
      axis.title.y = element_blank()
    )
#### Combine

fig = ggdraw() +
  draw_plot(spec_mouse, x = 0.0, y = 0, width = .33, height = .48) +
  draw_plot(smc_mouse , x = 0.0, y = 0.5, width = .33, height = .48 )  +
  draw_plot_label(label = 'Mouse SMCs', size = 12,
                  x = c(-0.01), y = c(1.005), family = 'Helvetica')  +
  draw_plot(spec_pig, x = 0.34, y = 0, width = .34, height = .48) +
  draw_plot(smc_pig , x = 0.34, y = 0.5, width = .34 , height =  .48)  +
  draw_plot_label(label = 'Pig SMCs', size = 12,
                  x = c(0.4), y = c(1.005), family = 'Helvetica')  +
  draw_plot(spec_human, x = 0.65, y = 0, width = .34, height = .48) +
  draw_plot(smc_human , x = 0.65, y = .5 , width = .34 , height = .48 )  +
  draw_plot_label(label = 'Human SMCs', size = 12,
                  x = c(0.65), y = c(1.005), family = 'Helvetica')  

fig
saveRDS(fig, file = 'UMAPS_individual_ds_species_specific_clusters_category.rds')


ggsave(filename = 'UMAPS_individual_ds_species_specific_clusters_category.pdf',  plot = fig, device = 'pdf', units = 'cm', dpi = 400, width = 8, height = 4, scale = 3)  

DimPlot(mouse, group.by = 'specificity') + DimPlot(human, group.by = 'specificity') + DimPlot(pig, group.by = 'specificity')
my_vec %in% colnames(mouse) %>% table()
```

```{r}
# Marker identification for cross-species SMC phenotypes mapping
Idents(pig) <- 'shared_clusters'
tmp_p <- FindAllMarkers(pig, assay = 'RNA', only.pos = T)
openxlsx::write.xlsx(x = tmp_p, file = 'pig_elastic_unified_markers.xlsx')

Idents(human) <- 'shared_clusters'
tmp_h <- FindAllMarkers(human, assay = 'RNA', only.pos = T)
openxlsx::write.xlsx(x = tmp_h, file = 'human_elastic_unified_markers.xlsx')

Idents(mouse) <- 'shared_clusters'
tmp_m <- FindAllMarkers(mouse, assay = 'RNA', only.pos = T)
openxlsx::write.xlsx(x = tmp_m, file = 'mouse_elastic_unified_markers.xlsx')

Idents(pig) <- 'smc_phenotypes'
tmp_p <- FindAllMarkers(pig, assay = 'RNA', only.pos = T)
openxlsx::write.xlsx(x = tmp_p, file = 'pig_elastic_ind_markers.xlsx')

Idents(human) <- 'smc_phenotypes'
tmp_h <- FindAllMarkers(human, assay = 'RNA', only.pos = T)
openxlsx::write.xlsx(x = tmp_h, file = 'human_elastic_ind_markers.xlsx')

Idents(mouse) <- 'smc_phenotypes'
tmp_m <- FindAllMarkers(mouse, assay = 'RNA', only.pos = T)
openxlsx::write.xlsx(x = tmp_m, file = 'mouse_elastic_ind_markers.xlsx')



```

```{r}
FeaturePlot_scCustom(pig, features = c('SERPINF1'))
FeaturePlot_scCustom(human, features = c('SERPINF1'))
FeaturePlot_scCustom(mouse, features = c('Serpinf1'))

FeaturePlot_scCustom(pig, features = c('TNFRSF11B'))
FeaturePlot_scCustom(human, features = c('TNFRSF11B'))
FeaturePlot_scCustom(mouse, features = c('Tnfrsf11b'))
```

# Marker identification for species-specific SMC phenotypes
To do for: mouse terminal, human DLX5, human-pig pericytes and contractile SMCs. Visualize expression to check specificity of markers for other datasets

# Mouse-specific terminal SMCs. Going back to mouse individual dataset. 

```{r}
Idents(mouse) <- 'specificity'

term_markers <- multiMarkerStats(
    wilcox=findMarkers(as.SingleCellExperiment(mouse), test="wilcox", direction="up",group = mouse$specificity, add.summary = TRUE),
    binom=findMarkers(as.SingleCellExperiment(mouse), test="binom", direction="up",group = mouse$specificity, add.summary = TRUE), sorted = TRUE
)

term_markers <- term_markers@listData[["Mouse-specific"]] %>% as.matrix() %>% as.data.frame()
term_markers <- term_markers[term_markers$wilcox.summary.AUC > 0.7,]
term_markers <- term_markers[order(term_markers$binom.summary.logFC, decreasing = T),] 
term_markers$gene <- rownames(term_markers)


# tmp_mouse <- FindAllMarkers(object = mouse, assay = 'RNA', test.use = 'roc', only.pos = T)
# tmp_mouse <- tmp_mouse[tmp_mouse$cluster == 'Mouse-specific', ]
Idents(mouse) <- 'specificity'
tmp_mouse <- FindAllMarkers(object = mouse, assay = 'RNA', test.use = 'MAST', only.pos = T)
tmp_mouse <- tmp_mouse[tmp_mouse$cluster == 'Mouse-specific', ]
```

# Human DLX5_SMCs. Majority of the cluster cells are placed specifically as unique human cells, so I will find markers for DLX5_SMCs cluster

```{r}
table(human$smc_phenotypes, human$specificity)

Idents(human) <- 'smc_phenotypes'

dlx5_markers <- multiMarkerStats(
    wilcox=findMarkers(as.SingleCellExperiment(human), test="wilcox", direction="up",group = human$smc_phenotypes, add.summary = TRUE),
    binom=findMarkers(as.SingleCellExperiment(human), test="binom", direction="up",group = human$smc_phenotypes, add.summary = TRUE), sorted = TRUE
)

dlx5_markers <- dlx5_markers@listData[["DLX5_SMC"]] %>% as.matrix() %>% as.data.frame()
dlx5_markers <- dlx5_markers[dlx5_markers$wilcox.summary.AUC > 0.7,]
dlx5_markers <- dlx5_markers[order(dlx5_markers$binom.summary.logFC, decreasing = T),] 
dlx5_markers$gene <- rownames(dlx5_markers)


# dlx5_markers <- FindAllMarkers(object = human, assay = 'RNA', test.use = 'roc', only.pos = T)
# dlx5_markers <- dlx5_markers[dlx5_markers$cluster == 'DLX5_SMC',]

dlx5_markers <- FindAllMarkers(object = human, assay = 'RNA', test.use = 'MAST', only.pos = T)
dlx5_markers <- dlx5_markers[dlx5_markers$cluster == 'DLX5_SMC',]
```

# Human-pig specific pericytes. Find common markers

```{r}
Idents(human) <- 'smc_phenotypes'

PC_markers <- multiMarkerStats(
    wilcox=findMarkers(as.SingleCellExperiment(human), test="wilcox", direction="up",group = human$smc_phenotypes, add.summary = TRUE),
    binom=findMarkers(as.SingleCellExperiment(human), test="binom", direction="up",group = human$smc_phenotypes, add.summary = TRUE), sorted = TRUE
)

PC_markers <- PC_markers@listData[["Pericytes"]] %>% as.matrix() %>% as.data.frame()
PC_markers <- PC_markers[PC_markers$wilcox.summary.AUC > 0.7,]
PC_markers <- PC_markers[order(PC_markers$binom.summary.logFC, decreasing = T),] 
colnames(PC_markers) <- paste('Human', colnames(PC_markers), sep = '_')
PC_markers$gene <- rownames(PC_markers)

# PC_markers <- FindAllMarkers(object = human, assay = 'RNA',  only.pos = T)
# PC_markers <- PC_markers[PC_markers$cluster == 'Pericytes',]
# colnames(PC_markers)[1:6] <- paste('Human', colnames(PC_markers)[1:6], sep = '_')

# PC_markers <- FindAllMarkers(object = human, assay = 'RNA',  only.pos = T, test.use = 'MAST')
# PC_markers <- PC_markers[PC_markers$cluster == 'Pericytes',]
# colnames(PC_markers)[1:6] <- paste('Human', colnames(PC_markers)[1:6], sep = '_')


Idents(pig) <- 'smc_phenotypes'
PC_markers_pig <- multiMarkerStats(
    wilcox=findMarkers(as.SingleCellExperiment(pig), test="wilcox", direction="up",group = pig$smc_phenotypes, add.summary = TRUE),
    binom=findMarkers(as.SingleCellExperiment(pig), test="binom", direction="up",group = pig$smc_phenotypes, add.summary = TRUE), sorted = TRUE
)

PC_markers_pig <- PC_markers_pig@listData[["Pericytes"]] %>% as.matrix() %>% as.data.frame()
PC_markers_pig <- PC_markers_pig[PC_markers_pig$wilcox.summary.AUC > 0.7,]
PC_markers_pig <- PC_markers_pig[order(PC_markers_pig$binom.summary.logFC, decreasing = T),] 
colnames(PC_markers_pig) <- paste('Pig', colnames(PC_markers_pig), sep = '_')
PC_markers_pig$gene <- rownames(PC_markers_pig)

# PC_markers_pig <- FindAllMarkers(object = pig, assay = 'RNA',  only.pos = T)
# PC_markers_pig <- PC_markers_pig[PC_markers_pig$cluster == 'Pericytes',]
# colnames(PC_markers_pig)[1:6] <- paste('Pig', colnames(PC_markers_pig)[1:6], sep = '_')
# PC_markers_pig <- PC_markers_pig[PC_markers_pig$Pig_p_val_adj < 0.05,]

# PC_markers_pig <- FindAllMarkers(object = pig, assay = 'RNA',  only.pos = T, test.use = 'MAST')
# PC_markers_pig <- PC_markers_pig[PC_markers_pig$cluster == 'Pericytes',]
# colnames(PC_markers_pig)[1:6] <- paste('Pig', colnames(PC_markers_pig)[1:6], sep = '_')


PC_markers_HP <- merge.data.frame(x = PC_markers, y = PC_markers_pig, by = 'gene')
```

# Human-pig specific contractile SMCs. Not all contractile SMCs are pig-human specific. Some of them are common between the species. I will split cSMCs and find markers only for human-pig specific ones


```{r}
table(human$smc_phenotypes, human$specificity)
table(pig$smc_phenotypes, pig$specificity)

human$smc_phenotypes_specificity <- paste(human$smc_phenotypes, human$specificity, sep = '_')
pig$smc_phenotypes_specificity <- paste(pig$smc_phenotypes, pig$specificity, sep = '_')

Idents(human) <- 'smc_phenotypes_specificity'
PC_markers <- multiMarkerStats(
    wilcox=findMarkers(as.SingleCellExperiment(human), test="wilcox", direction="up",group = human$smc_phenotypes_specificity, add.summary = TRUE),
    binom=findMarkers(as.SingleCellExperiment(human), test="binom", direction="up",group = human$smc_phenotypes_specificity, add.summary = TRUE), sorted = TRUE
)

PC_markers <- PC_markers@listData[["Contractile_Human-pig-specific"]] %>% as.matrix() %>% as.data.frame()
PC_markers <- PC_markers[PC_markers$wilcox.summary.AUC > 0.7,]
PC_markers <- PC_markers[order(PC_markers$binom.summary.logFC, decreasing = T),] 
colnames(PC_markers) <- paste('Human', colnames(PC_markers), sep = '_')
PC_markers$gene <- rownames(PC_markers)

# PC_markers <- FindAllMarkers(object = human, assay = 'RNA', test.use = 'roc', only.pos = T)
# PC_markers <- PC_markers[PC_markers$cluster == 'Contractile_Human-pig-specific',]
# colnames(PC_markers)[1:6] <- paste('Human', colnames(PC_markers)[1:6], sep = '_')


####### MAST
Idents(human) <- 'smc_phenotypes_specificity'
PC_markers <- FindAllMarkers(object = human, assay = 'RNA', test.use = 'MAST', only.pos = T)
PC_markers <- PC_markers[PC_markers$cluster == 'Contractile_Human-pig-specific',]
colnames(PC_markers)[1:6] <- paste('Human', colnames(PC_markers)[1:6], sep = '_')

###############################
Idents(pig) <- 'smc_phenotypes_specificity'
PC_markers_pig <- multiMarkerStats(
    wilcox=findMarkers(as.SingleCellExperiment(pig), test="wilcox", direction="up",group = pig$smc_phenotypes_specificity, add.summary = TRUE),
    binom=findMarkers(as.SingleCellExperiment(pig), test="binom", direction="up",group = pig$smc_phenotypes_specificity, add.summary = TRUE), sorted = TRUE
)

PC_markers_pig <- PC_markers_pig@listData[["Contractile_Human-pig-specific"]] %>% as.matrix() %>% as.data.frame()
PC_markers_pig <- PC_markers_pig[PC_markers_pig$wilcox.summary.AUC > 0.7,]
PC_markers_pig <- PC_markers_pig[order(PC_markers_pig$binom.summary.logFC, decreasing = T),] 
colnames(PC_markers_pig) <- paste('Pig', colnames(PC_markers_pig), sep = '_')
PC_markers_pig$gene <- rownames(PC_markers_pig)

# PC_markers_pig <- FindAllMarkers(object = pig, assay = 'RNA', test.use = 'roc', only.pos = T)
# PC_markers_pig <- PC_markers_pig[PC_markers_pig$cluster == 'Contractile_Human-pig-specific',]
# colnames(PC_markers_pig)[1:6] <- paste('Pig', colnames(PC_markers_pig)[1:6], sep = '_')


####### MAST
Idents(pig) <- 'smc_phenotypes_specificity'
PC_markers_pig <- FindAllMarkers(object = pig, assay = 'RNA', test.use = 'MAST', only.pos = T)
PC_markers_pig <- PC_markers_pig[PC_markers_pig$cluster == 'Contractile_Human-pig-specific',]
colnames(PC_markers_pig)[1:6] <- paste('Pig', colnames(PC_markers_pig)[1:6], sep = '_')

cSMC_markers_HP <- merge.data.frame(x = PC_markers, y = PC_markers_pig, by = 'gene')
```

```{r}
species_markers <- list('Mouse terminal' = term_markers, 
                        'Human DLX5' = dlx5_markers,
                        'Human-pig pericytes' = PC_markers_HP,
                        'Human-pig cSMCs' = cSMC_markers_HP)
saveRDS(species_markers, file = 'df_markers_species_specific_clusters_scran.rds')
openxlsx::write.xlsx(species_markers, file = "Markers_species_specific_clusters_scran.xlsx",
                     asTable = TRUE, overwrite = TRUE)

# species_markers <- list('Mouse terminal' = tmp_mouse, 
#                         'Human DLX5' = dlx5_markers,
#                         'Human-pig pericytes' = PC_markers_HP,
#                         'Human-pig cSMCs' = cSMC_markers_HP)
# saveRDS(species_markers, file = 'df_markers_species_specific_clusters_MAST.rds')
# openxlsx::write.xlsx(species_markers, file = "Markers_species_specific_clusters_MAST.xlsx",
#                      asTable = TRUE, overwrite = TRUE)
```

# Visualization of markers for species-specific clusters. 

Make one-to-one orthologs, but keep features that are not expressed in other species

```{r}
species_markers <- readRDS("/faststorage/project/THOR/diana/integration_pigs_with_WT/integrated_pig_mice_hum/closer/more_closer/SMC/after_bengal/cluster_specificity/df_markers_species_specific_clusters.rds") # or _scran with binom mode
DefaultAssay(mouse) <- 'RNA'
DefaultAssay(pig) <- 'RNA'
DefaultAssay(human) <- 'RNA'

# mouse$specificity <- ifelse(is.na(mouse$specificity) == T, 'Other', mouse$specificity)
# pig$specificity <- ifelse(is.na(pig$specificity) == T, 'Other', pig$specificity)
# human$specificity <- ifelse(is.na(human$specificity) == T, 'Other', human$specificity)
# 
# mouse$specificity <- ifelse(mouse$specificity == 'Shared', 'shared', mouse$specificity)
# pig$specificity <- ifelse(pig$specificity == 'Shared', 'shared', pig$specificity)
# human$specificity <- ifelse(human$specificity == 'Shared', 'shared', human$specificity)


mouse$smc_phenotypes_specificity <- paste(mouse$smc_phenotypes, mouse$specificity, sep = '_')
human$smc_phenotypes_specificity <- paste(human$smc_phenotypes, human$specificity, sep = '_')
pig$smc_phenotypes_specificity <- paste(pig$smc_phenotypes, pig$specificity, sep = '_')

my_vec <- c('Contractile_Human_pig_specific', 'DLX5_SMC_Human_specific', 'Pericytes_Human_pig_specific', 'Terminal_Mouse_specific')
mouse$for_heatmap <- ifelse(mouse$smc_phenotypes_specificity %in% my_vec, mouse$smc_phenotypes_specificity, 'Mouse_rest')
pig$for_heatmap <- ifelse(pig$smc_phenotypes_specificity %in% my_vec, pig$smc_phenotypes_specificity, 'Pig_rest')
human$for_heatmap <- ifelse(human$smc_phenotypes_specificity %in% my_vec, human$smc_phenotypes_specificity, 'Human_rest')
```

```{r}
final_species_genes <- readRDS("/faststorage/project/THOR/diana/integration_pigs_with_WT/integrated_pig_mice_hum/closer/more_closer/biomart_109_orth_new.rds")
final_species_genes$Human_gene_name_v98 <- ifelse(is.na(final_species_genes$Human_gene_name_v98) == TRUE, final_species_genes$`Human Ensembl ID`, final_species_genes$Human_gene_name_v98)
final_species_genes$Human_gene_name_v98 <- ifelse(final_species_genes$Human_gene_name_v98 == '', final_species_genes$`Human Ensembl ID`, final_species_genes$Human_gene_name_v98)

final_species_genes[nrow(final_species_genes)+1,'Human_gene_name_v98' ] <- 'CST3'
final_species_genes[nrow(final_species_genes),'Human Ensembl ID' ] <- 'CST3'
final_species_genes[nrow(final_species_genes),'mouse_origin' ] <- 'Cst3'
final_species_genes[nrow(final_species_genes),'pig_origin' ] <- 'CST3'

final_species_genes[nrow(final_species_genes)+1,'Human_gene_name_v98' ] <- 'BGLAP'
final_species_genes[nrow(final_species_genes),'Human Ensembl ID' ]  <- 'BGLAP'
final_species_genes[nrow(final_species_genes),'mouse_origin' ] <- 'Bglap'
final_species_genes[nrow(final_species_genes),'pig_origin' ] <- 'BGLAP'


final_species_genes[nrow(final_species_genes)+1,'Human_gene_name_v98' ] <- 'COL9A3'
final_species_genes[nrow(final_species_genes),'Human Ensembl ID' ] <-  'COL9A3'
final_species_genes[nrow(final_species_genes),'mouse_origin' ] <- 'Col9a3'
final_species_genes[nrow(final_species_genes),'pig_origin' ] <- 'COL9A3'
```

```{r}
DefaultAssay(mouse) <- 'RNA' 
mouse_2 <- mouse

# Counts
counts_all <- GetAssayData(object = mouse_2, slot = "counts", assay = 'RNA')
my_df <- data.frame(old=rownames(mouse_2), ##create a dataframe of correspondence
                    old_2=rownames(mouse_2),
                    original = rownames(mouse_2))
rownames(my_df) <- rownames(mouse_2)

colnames(my_df)[2] <- 'mouse_origin' # Mouse_Gene_Names_v99

table(my_df$mouse_origin %in% final_species_genes$mouse_origin)
final_species_genes$scRnaseq_mouse <- final_species_genes$mouse_origin %in% my_df$original
mouse_unique <-  my_df$original[!my_df$original %in% final_species_genes$mouse_origin]
my_df_2 <- merge(my_df,final_species_genes,by="mouse_origin")  ## merging data about mouse dataset genes and ortholog table, Mouse_Gene_Names_v99
my_df_2$human_fin <- ifelse(is.na(my_df_2$`Human Ensembl ID`) == TRUE, my_df_2$`Human Ensembl ID`, my_df_2$Human_gene_name_v98)
rownames(my_df_2) <- my_df_2$original
my_df_2['Cst3', 'human_fin'] <- 'CST3'
filtered_counts_h <- counts_all[my_df_2$original, ] ## keep only genes that have orthologous
rownames(filtered_counts_h) <- my_df_2$human_fin
mouse_2@assays$RNA@counts <- filtered_counts_h

# Data
counts_all <- GetAssayData(object = mouse_2, slot = "data", assay = 'RNA')
my_df <- data.frame(old=rownames(mouse_2), ##create a dataframe of correspondence
                    old_2=rownames(mouse_2),
                    original = rownames(mouse_2))
rownames(my_df) <- rownames(mouse_2)

colnames(my_df)[2] <- 'mouse_origin' # Mouse_Gene_Names_v99

table(my_df$mouse_origin %in% final_species_genes$mouse_origin)
final_species_genes$scRnaseq_mouse <- final_species_genes$mouse_origin %in% my_df$original
mouse_unique <-  my_df$original[!my_df$original %in% final_species_genes$mouse_origin]
my_df_2 <- merge(my_df,final_species_genes,by="mouse_origin")  ## merging data about mouse dataset genes and ortholog table, Mouse_Gene_Names_v99
my_df_2$human_fin <- ifelse(is.na(my_df_2$`Human Ensembl ID`) == TRUE, my_df_2$`Human Ensembl ID`, my_df_2$Human_gene_name_v98)
rownames(my_df_2) <- my_df_2$original
my_df_2['Cst3', 'human_fin'] <- 'CST3'
filtered_counts_h <- counts_all[my_df_2$original, ] ## keep only genes that have orthologous
rownames(filtered_counts_h) <- my_df_2$human_fin
mouse_2@assays$RNA@data <- filtered_counts_h

```


```{r}
DefaultAssay(pig) <- 'RNA' 
pig_2 <- pig

# Counts
DefaultAssay(pig_2) <- 'RNA' 
counts_all <- GetAssayData(object = pig_2, slot = "counts", assay = 'RNA')
my_df <- data.frame(old=rownames(pig_2), ##create a dataframe of correspondence
                    old_2=rownames(pig_2),
                    original = rownames(pig_2))
rownames(my_df) <- rownames(pig_2)
colnames(my_df)[2] <- 'pig_origin' # Pig gene name
final_species_genes$scRnaseq_pig_2 <- final_species_genes$pig_origin %in% my_df$pig_origin
my_df_2 <- merge(my_df,final_species_genes,by=c('pig_origin'))  ## merging data about mouse dataset genes and ortholog table, Pig gene name
my_df_2$human_fin <- ifelse(is.na(my_df_2$Human_gene_name_v98) == TRUE, my_df_2$`Human Ensembl ID`, my_df_2$Human_gene_name_v98)
rownames(my_df_2) <- my_df_2$original
my_df_2['CST3', 'human_fin'] <- 'CST3'
filtered_counts_h <- counts_all[my_df_2$original, ] ## keep only genes that have orthologous
rownames(filtered_counts_h) <- my_df_2$human_fin
pig_2@assays$RNA@counts <- filtered_counts_h

# Data
DefaultAssay(pig_2) <- 'RNA' 
counts_all <- GetAssayData(object = pig, slot = "data", assay = 'RNA')
my_df <- data.frame(old=rownames(pig_2), ##create a dataframe of correspondence
                    old_2=rownames(pig_2),
                    original = rownames(pig_2))
rownames(my_df) <- rownames(pig_2)
colnames(my_df)[2] <- 'pig_origin' # Pig gene name
final_species_genes$scRnaseq_pig_2 <- final_species_genes$pig_origin %in% my_df$pig_origin
my_df_2 <- merge(my_df,final_species_genes,by=c('pig_origin'))  ## merging data about mouse dataset genes and ortholog table, Pig gene name
my_df_2$human_fin <- ifelse(is.na(my_df_2$Human_gene_name_v98) == TRUE, my_df_2$`Human Ensembl ID`, my_df_2$Human_gene_name_v98)
rownames(my_df_2) <- my_df_2$original
my_df_2['CST3', 'human_fin'] <- 'CST3'
filtered_counts_h <- counts_all[my_df_2$original, ] ## keep only genes that have orthologous
rownames(filtered_counts_h) <- my_df_2$human_fin
pig_2@assays$RNA@data <- filtered_counts_h
```



```{r}
human_2 <-  human[, sample(colnames(human), size = 2500, replace = F)]
pig_2 <-  pig_2[, sample(colnames(pig_2), size = 2500, replace = F)]
merged <- Merge_Seurat_List(list_seurat = list(mouse_2, pig_2, human_2), merge.data = T)
saveRDS(merged, file = 'merged_pig_human_mouse_smcs.rds')


merged <- readRDS("/faststorage/project/THOR/diana/integration_pigs_with_WT/integrated_pig_mice_hum/closer/more_closer/SMC/after_bengal/cluster_specificity/merged_pig_human_mouse_smcs.rds")
my_data <- readRDS("/faststorage/project/THOR/diana/integration_pigs_with_WT/integrated_pig_mice_hum/closer/more_closer/SMC/after_bengal/cluster_specificity/HE_RPCA_cell_categorization.rds") # reclustered shared clusters


# We need to devide 'rest categories' to shared phenotypes
merged$for_heatmap <- factor(merged$for_heatmap)
xxx <- my_data$shared_clusters 

names(xxx) <-  substr(names(xxx), start = 1, stop = 16)
xxx <- xxx[substr(colnames(merged), start = 2, stop = 17)]
names(xxx) <- colnames(merged)
merged$shared_clusters <- xxx
merged$shared_clusters <- as.character(merged$shared_clusters)
merged$shared_clusters[is.na(merged$shared_clusters)] <- 'specific'
table(merged$shared_clusters, merged$for_heatmap)

merged$for_heatmap <-
  factor(merged$for_heatmap, levels = 
    c(
      "DLX5_SMC_Human_specific",
      "Pericytes_Human_pig_specific",
      'Contractile_Human_pig_specific',
       "Terminal_Mouse_specific",
      'Human_rest',
      'Pig_rest',
      'Mouse_rest'
    
  ))

merged$xxx <- paste(merged$shared_clusters, merged$for_heatmap, sep = '_')

merged$xxx <- ifelse(merged$xxx %in% c('Contractile_Human_rest', 'Contractile_Pig_rest', 'Contractile_Mouse_rest', 'specific_Mouse_rest'), 'Contractile_shared', merged$xxx) # because mouse contractile cells contribute to pig-uman contractile cluster, but too little, technically theu are just shared contractile
merged$xxx <- ifelse(merged$xxx %in% c('Transitional_Human_rest', 'Transitional_Pig_rest', 'Transitional_Mouse_rest'), 'Transitional_shared', merged$xxx )
merged$xxx <- ifelse(merged$xxx %in% c('Terminal_Human_rest', 'Terminal_Pig_rest', 'Terminal_Mouse_rest'), 'Terminal_shared', merged$xxx )
merged$xxx <- ifelse(merged$xxx %in% c('Proliferating_Human_rest', 'Proliferating_Pig_rest', 'Proliferating_Mouse_rest'), 'Proliferating_shared', merged$xxx )
table(merged$xxx)

# names(merged$xxx[merged$xxx == 'Terminal_shared'])
merged$for_heatmap_2 <- merged$for_heatmap
merged$for_heatmap_2 <- as.character(merged$for_heatmap_2)
merged$for_heatmap_2[names(merged$xxx[merged$xxx == 'Terminal_shared'])] <- 'Terminal_shared'
merged$for_heatmap_2[names(merged$xxx[merged$xxx == 'Contractile_shared'])] <- 'Contractile_shared'
merged$for_heatmap_2[names(merged$xxx[merged$xxx == 'Transitional_shared'])] <- 'Transitional_shared'
merged$for_heatmap_2[names(merged$xxx[merged$xxx == 'Proliferating_shared'])] <- 'Proliferating_shared'

table(merged$for_heatmap_2, merged$smc_phenotypes) # 
table(merged$for_heatmap_2)



merged <- merged[,merged$for_heatmap_2 %in%  c(
      "DLX5_SMC_Human_specific",
      "Pericytes_Human_pig_specific",
      'Contractile_Human_pig_specific',
       "Terminal_Mouse_specific",
      'Contractile_shared',
      'Transitional_shared',
      'Terminal_shared',
      'Proliferating_shared')]

#### Make heatmap
Idents(merged) <- 'for_heatmap_2'


merged$for_heatmap_2 <-
  factor(merged$for_heatmap_2, levels = 
    c(
      "DLX5_SMC_Human_specific",
      "Pericytes_Human_pig_specific",
      'Contractile_Human_pig_specific',
       "Terminal_Mouse_specific",
      'Contractile_shared',
      'Transitional_shared',
      'Terminal_shared',
     'Proliferating_shared' ))


saveRDS(merged, file = 'merged_for_heatmap.rds')

# tmp_mouse_1 <- FindAllMarkers(object = merged, assay = 'RNA', test.use = 'roc',  only.pos = T, max.cells.per.ident = 3000, logfc.threshold = 0.1, min.diff.pct = 0.01, min.pct = 0.1)
merged <- readRDS("~/THOR/diana/integration_pigs_with_WT/integrated_pig_mice_hum/closer/more_closer/SMC/after_bengal/cluster_specificity/merged_for_heatmap.rds")
tmp_mouse <- FindAllMarkers(object = merged, assay = 'RNA',  min.pct = 0.3, only.pos = T, max.cells.per.ident = 3000, min.diff.pct = 0.2)

top_markers <- c()
for (i in unique(tmp_mouse$cluster)[c(8,7, 5, 4, 3,2,1,6)]){
  top_markers <- c(top_markers, head((subset(tmp_mouse, subset = tmp_mouse$cluster == i)[order(subset(tmp_mouse, subset = tmp_mouse$cluster == i)$avg_log2FC, decreasing = T),])$gene, 7))
}
top_markers[6] <- 'MYH10'
top_markers[22] <- 'COL2A1'
top_markers[42] <- 'LUM'
top_markers[5] <- 'MSX2'
top_markers[21] <- 'ACTG2'
top_markers[13] <- 'GJA4'
top_markers[14] <- 'RGS5'
top_markers[29] <- 'ACTA2'
top_markers[30] <- 'ITGA8'
top_markers[45] <- 'COL1A2'
# species_markers <- readRDS("/faststorage/project/THOR/diana/integration_pigs_with_WT/integrated_pig_mice_hum/closer/more_closer/SMC/after_bengal/cluster_specificity/df_markers_species_specific_clusters_scran.rds")
# 
# top_markers <- c()
# for (i in names(species_markers)[c(2,3,4,1)]){
#   my_col <- colnames(species_markers[[i]])[ grep('Top', colnames(species_markers[[i]]))][1]
#   top_markers <- c(top_markers, species_markers[[i]][order(species_markers[[i]][,my_col], decreasing = F), 'gene'][1:10])
# }

p1 <- DotPlot(
  merged,
  features = toupper(unique(top_markers)),
  assay = 'RNA',
  scale = T,
  group.by = 'for_heatmap_2'
) + 
  # ggtitle('Top markers for SMC phenotypes pig aorta plaque') + 
  # coord_flip() +
  # RotatedAxis() + 
  scale_colour_gradientn(name = 'log2 (count + 1)',colours = rev(brewer.pal(n = 11, name = "RdBu")))  +
  theme_bw() + theme(legend.position = 'bottom') +
  theme(axis.line  = element_blank()) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(
    angle = 90,
    vjust = 0.5,
    hjust = 1
  )) +
  ylab('') +
  theme(axis.ticks = element_blank()) 
print(p1)


ggsave(filename = 'dotplot_merged_species-specific_clusters_6.pdf', plot = p1, device = 'pdf', width = 9.5, height = 2.9, units = 'cm', scale = 3)
```

```{r}
# For enrichment analysis
table(merged$for_heatmap_2)
Idents(merged) <- 'for_heatmap_2'
tmp <- FindAllMarkers(merged, assay = 'RNA', only.pos = T)
saveRDS(tmp, 'markers_for_enrichment.rds')


```


```{r}
# terminal
feats <- species_markers$`Mouse terminal`[1:12, 'gene']

FeaturePlot_scCustom(mouse, features = feats) + plot_annotation(title = 'Mouse SMCs') 

FeaturePlot_scCustom(pig, features = str_to_upper(feats) )+ plot_annotation(title = 'Pig SMCs') 

FeaturePlot_scCustom(human, features = str_to_upper(feats)) + plot_annotation(title = 'Human SMCs') 

# DLX5 human specific
feats <- c(species_markers$`Human DLX5`[1:12, 'gene'], 'MECOM',  'ID3')

# Pericytes
feats <- c(species_markers$`Human-pig pericytes`[species_markers$`Human-pig pericytes`$Human_pct.2 < 0.5 & species_markers$`Human-pig pericytes`$Pig_pct.2 < 0.5, 'gene'], 'Gucy1b3', 'Filip1')

# cSMCs
feats <- c(species_markers$`Human-pig cSMCs`[, 'gene'], )

FeaturePlot_scCustom(mouse, features = str_to_title(feats)  ) + plot_annotation(title = 'Mouse SMCs') 

FeaturePlot_scCustom(pig, features = str_to_upper(feats) )+ plot_annotation(title = 'Pig SMCs') 

FeaturePlot_scCustom(human, features = str_to_upper(feats)) + plot_annotation(title = 'Human SMCs') 
```

```{r}
my_data <- all_datasets$many_higher_expr_seuratRPCA
DefaultAssay(my_data) <- 'RNA_genes'

ddr <- c("ABL1", "ABRAXAS1", "ACTB", "ACTL6A", "ACTL6B", "ACTR2", "ACTR5", "ACTR8", "ANKLE1", "AP5S1", "AP5Z1", "APLF", "ARID1A", "ARID1B", "ARID2", "ATM", "ATP23", "ATR", "ATRIP", "AUNIP", "BABAM1", "BABAM2", "BCL7A", "BCL7B", "BCL7C", "BLM", "BRCA1", "BRCA2", "BRCC3", "BRD7", "BRD8", "BRIP1", "BRME1", "C14orf39", "C1QBP", "CDC45", "CDC7", "CDCA5", "CGAS", "CHD4", "CHEK1", "CHEK2", "CIB1", "CREBBP", "CSNK2A1", "CSNK2A2", "CYREN", "DCLRE1A", "DCLRE1B", "DCLRE1C", "DDX1", "DDX11", "DEK", "DMAP1", "DMC1", "DNA2", "DNTT", "DPF1", "DPF2", "DPF3", "DTX3L", "EID3", "EME1", "EME2", "EP400", "EPC1", "EPC2", "ERCC1", "ERCC4", "ERCC5", "ERCC6", "ERCC8", "ESCO2", "EXD2", "EYA1", "EYA3", "FAN1", "FANCB", "FANCD2", "FANCM", "FBH1", "FEN1", "FIGNL1", "FMN2", "FOXM1", "FUS", "GEN1", "GGN", "GINS2", "GINS4", "H2AX", "HDGFL2", "HELB", "HELQ", "HMCES", "HMGA2", "HMGB1", "HMGB2", "HPF1", "HSF1", "HSF2BP", "HTATSF1", "HUS1", "HUS1B", "IFFO1", "ING3", "INIP", "INO80", "INTS3", "KASH5", "KAT5", "KDM1A", "KDM2A", "KDM4D", "KHDC3L", "KLHL15", "KMT5A", "KMT5B", "KMT5C", "LIG3", "LIG4", "MAD2L2", "MAGEF1", "MAJIN", "MARF1", "MBTD1", "MCM2", "MCM3", "MCM4", "MCM5", "MCM6", "MCM7", "MCM8", "MCM9", "MCMDC2", "MEAF6", "MEIOB", "MEIOC", "MGMT", "MIR221", "MLH1", "MMS22L", "MORF4L1", "MORF4L2", "MPND", "MRE11", "MRGBP", "MRNIP", "MSH2", "MTA1", "MUS81", "NABP1", "NABP2", "NBN", "NHEJ1", "NIPBL", "NSD2", "NSMCE1", "NSMCE2", "NSMCE3", "NSMCE4A", "NUCKS1", "NUDT16L1", "OGG1", "OOEP", "OTUB1", "OTUB2", "PALB2", "PARP1", "PARP2", "PARP3", "PARP9", "PARPBP", "PAXX", "PBRM1", "PELI1", "PHF10", "PIAS4", "PLK1", "PML", "PNKP", "POGZ", "POLA1", "POLB", "POLL", "POLM", "POLN", "POLQ", "POT1", "PPP4C", "PPP4R2", "PPP4R3B", "PPP5C", "PRDM9", "PRKDC", "PRMT1", "PRPF19", "PSMD14", "RAD21", "RAD21L1", "RAD50", "RAD51", "RAD51AP1", "RAD51B", "RAD51C", "RAD51D", "RAD52", "RAD54B", "RAD54L", "RADX", "RBBP8", "REC8", "RECQL", "RECQL4", "RECQL5", "REV3L", "RFWD3", "RHNO1", "RIF1", "RMI1", "RMI2", "RNF126", "RNF138", "RNF168", "RNF169", "RNF8", "RPA1", "RPA2", "RPA3", "RPA4", "RTEL1", "RUVBL1", "RUVBL2", "SAMHD1", "SENP3", "SETD2", "SETMAR", "SETX", "SFPQ", "SFR1", "SHLD1", "SHLD2", "SHLD3", "SIRT1", "SIRT6", "SKP2", "SLF1", "SLF2", "SLX1A", "SLX1B", "SLX4", "SMARCA2", "SMARCA4", "SMARCAD1", "SMARCAL1", "SMARCB1", "SMARCC1", "SMARCC2", "SMARCD1", "SMARCD2", "SMARCD3", "SMARCE1", "SMC5", "SMC6", "SMCHD1", "SPIDR", "SPIRE1", "SPIRE2", "SPO11", "SWI5", "SWSAP1", "TDP1", "TDP2", "TENT4A", "TERB1", "TERB2", "TERF2IP", "TEX15", "TFIP11", "TIMELESS", "TNKS1BP1", "TONSL", "TOP2B", "TOP3A", "TOPBP1", "TP53", "TP53BP1", "TRIP13", "TRRAP", "TWIST1", "UBE2N", "UBE2V2", "UBQLN4", "UHRF1", "UIMC1", "USP51", "UVRAG", "VCP", "VPS72", "WAS", "WDR48", "WRAP53", "WRN", "XRCC1", "XRCC2", "XRCC3", "XRCC4", "XRCC5", "XRCC6", "YEATS4", "YY1", "ZBTB7A", "ZCWPW1", "ZFYVE26", "ZGRF1", "ZMYND8", "ZNF365", 
         "ZSWIM7")

ros <- c("ABCC1", "ATOX1", "CAT", "CDKN2D", "EGLN2", "ERCC2", "FES", "FTL", "G6PD", "GCLC", "GCLM", "GLRX", "GLRX2", "GPX3", "GPX4", "GSR", "HHEX", "HMOX2", "IPCEF1", "JUNB", "LAMTOR5", "LSP1", "MBP", "MGST1", "MPO", "MSRA", "NDUFA6", "NDUFB4", "NDUFS2", "NQO1", "OXSR1", "PDLIM1", "PFKP", "PRDX1", "PRDX2", "PRDX4", "PRDX6", "PRNP", "PTPA", "SBNO2", "SCAF4", "SELENOS", "SOD1", "SOD2", "SRXN1", "STK25", "TXN", "TXNRD1", "TXNRD2")



my_data <- AddModuleScore(
  object = my_data,
  features = list(ros),
  ctrl = 200,assay = 'RNA_genes', seed = 1984, name = 'ROS')
  

p <- FeaturePlot_scCustom(
  seurat_object = my_data,
  features = 'ROS1',
  order = F,
  split.by = 'species', pt.size = 1, na_cutoff = 0, colors_use =  viridis_magma_dark_high) & NoAxes() & theme(aspect.ratio = 1)



p
ggsave(filename = 'ROS_species_split.pdf', device = 'pdf',plot = p, width = 10, height = 
         3, scale = 1.2)

p <- DimPlot_scCustom(
    seurat_object = my_data,
    reduction = 'umap',
    group.by = 'smc_phenotypes',
    pt.size = 1,
    shuffle = TRUE,
    # label = T,
    # label.box = T,
    colors_use = pal_celltypes_all,
    # repel = T,
    # label.size = 5
  ) +  
    theme(plot.title = element_blank()) + 
    scale_color_manual(values = pal_celltypes_all) +
    theme(
      axis.line = element_blank(),
      axis.text.y = element_blank(),
      axis.ticks = element_blank(),
      axis.text.x = element_blank(),
      axis.title.x = element_blank(),
      axis.title.y = element_blank(),
      text =  element_text(family = "Helvetica")
    )& theme(legend.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent"),
             legend.box.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent"),
             panel.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent"),
             panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
             panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
             plot.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent",
                                            color = NA)) & theme(aspect.ratio = 1)



p
ggsave(filename = 'HE_RPCA_SMC_phenotypes.pdf', device = 'pdf',plot = p, width = 3, height = 
         2, scale = 2)
```


```{r}
human$is_pericytes <- ifelse(human$smc_phenotypes == 'Pericytes', 'Pericytes', 'Non-pericytes')
Idents(human) <- 'is_pericytes'
PC_markers <- FindAllMarkers(object = human, assay = 'RNA', test.use = 'roc')
PC_markers <- PC_markers[PC_markers$cluster == 'Pericytes',]

sum(mouse@assays$RNA@data['Cd200',] > 0) / dim(mouse)[2] 

sum(human@assays$RNA@data['CD200',] > 0) / dim(human)[2] 

sum(pig@assays$RNA@data['CD200',] > 0) / dim(pig)[2] 

p1 <- FeaturePlot_scCustom(mouse, features = 'Cd200',order = F) 
p2 <- FeaturePlot_scCustom(pig, features = 'CD200',order = F) 
p3 <- FeaturePlot_scCustom(human, features = 'CD200',order = F) 

ggdraw() +
  draw_plot(p1, x = 0.0, y = 0, width = .33, height = .48) +
  draw_plot_label(label = 'Mouse SMCs, 86%', size = 12,
                  x = c(-0.01), y = c(0.5), family = 'Helvetica')  +
  
  draw_plot(p2, x = 0.34, y = 0, width = .34, height = .48) +
 
  draw_plot_label(label = 'Pig SMCs, 33%', size = 12,
                  x = c(0.3), y = c(0.5), family = 'Helvetica')  +
  draw_plot(p3, x = 0.65, y = 0, width = .34, height = .48) +
 
  draw_plot_label(label = 'Human SMCs, 28%', size = 12,
                  x = c(0.6), y = c(0.5), family = 'Helvetica')  
```
